basic_details.job_title: EMRS Khunti Guest Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Eklavya Model Residential School Khunti (EMRS Khunti)
basic_details.short_information: Eklavya Model Residential School Khunti (EMRS Khunti) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of Guest Teacher Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Candidates with PGT: Integrated Post Graduate Course or Post Graduation with B.Ed. TGT: Graduation with B.Ed. or integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed. or CTET Paper-II qualified. Specific subject combinations and degrees required for each post. qualification can directly attend the interview on .

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 21 years, Max: 60 years (65 for retired teachers)
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 60 years Age Relaxation: Retired Teachers can apply up to 65 years of age, provided they are medically fit.

qualification.education_qualification: PGT: Integrated Post Graduate Course or Post Graduation with B.Ed. TGT: Graduation with B.Ed. or integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed. or CTET Paper-II qualified.
qualification.details: PGT: Integrated Post Graduate Course from NCTE recognized institution, in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate including B.Ed. component. OR Post Graduation (Master) Degree from a recognized institution with at least 50% marks in aggregate in the subject concerned AND B.Ed. Degree from NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks OR Three years integrated B. Ed. – M. Ed from NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks OR Four years Integrated graduation degree with at least 50% marks from NCTE recognized institution including B.Ed. component. TGT: Four years integrated graduation degree course from NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks in all subjects individually as well as in the aggregate. OR Bachelors / Honours Degree from a recognized institution with at least 50% marks in all subjects individually and also in aggregate. OR Post Graduation in concerned subject / any specialization in concerned subject with a minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade provided that the candidate has studied the subject(s) mentioned in the note below at the graduation level and three years integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed from NCTE recognized institution with atleast 50% marks. (B) B.Ed. Degree from NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks OR Three years integrated B.Ed. -M.Ed from NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks. (C) Qualified in the Central Teacher Eligibility Test (Paper-II).

salary_details.pay_scale: PGT: Rs. 35,000/- (with qual.) / Rs. 31,000/- (without qual.). TGT: Rs. 33,000/- (with qual.) / Rs. 29,000/- (without qual.).
salary_details.details: PGT: Rs. 35,000/- (with qualification) / Rs. 31,000/- (without qualification) TGT: Rs. 33,000/- (with qualification) / Rs. 29,000/- (without qualification)

selection_process: Panel of Guest Teachers will be prepared on the basis of educational qualifications
and performance in the walk-in interview. Teachers will be engaged from the panel as per requirement or as per the directions of NESTS
subject to clearing the Pre-Recruitment Medical Examination

content_sections.heading: EMRS Khunti Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the EMRS Khunti Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download EMRS Khunti Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: EMRS Khunti Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: PGT: Integrated Post Graduate Course from NCTE recognized institution, in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate including B.Ed. component. OR Post Graduation (Master) Degree from a recognized institution with at least 50% marks in aggregate in the subject concerned AND B.Ed. Degree from NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks OR Three years integrated B. Ed. – M. Ed from NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks OR Four years Integrated graduation degree with at least 50% marks from NCTE recognized institution including B.Ed. component. TGT: Four years integrated graduation degree course from NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks in all subjects individually as well as in the aggregate. OR Bachelors / Honours Degree from a recognized institution with at least 50% marks in all subjects individually and also in aggregate. OR Post Graduation in concerned subject / any specialization in concerned subject with a minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade provided that the candidate has studied the subject(s) mentioned in the note below at the graduation level and three years integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed from NCTE recognized institution with atleast 50% marks. (B) B.Ed. Degree from NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks OR Three years integrated B.Ed. -M.Ed from NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks. (C) Qualified in the Central Teacher Eligibility Test (Paper-II).

content_sections.heading: EMRS Khunti Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: EMRS Khunti Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 60 years Age Relaxation: Retired Teachers can apply up to 65 years of age, provided they are medically fit.

content_sections.heading: EMRS Khunti Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: PGT: Rs. 35,000/- (with qualification) / Rs. 31,000/- (without qualification) TGT: Rs. 33,000/- (with qualification) / Rs. 29,000/- (without qualification)

rows.event: Walk-in Interview for TGT Science, PGT Physics, TGT Maths, PGT Maths
Walk-in Interview for TGT Social Science, PGT History, PGT English, TGT English, TGT Hindi, TGT Sanskrit
Walk-in Interview for TGT Computer, PET Male, PET Female, TGT Music, TGT Art

content_sections.heading: EMRS Khunti Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Panel of Guest Teachers will be prepared on the basis of educational qualifications, teaching experience, and performance in the walk-in interview. Teachers will be engaged from the panel as per requirement or as per the directions of NESTS, subject to clearing the Pre-Recruitment Medical Examination, document verification, and any other required verification.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for EMRS Khunti Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for EMRS Khunti Guest Teacher posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled on different dates in July 2026, starting from July 13th, 14th, and 15th, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the Guest Teacher positions?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all Guest Teacher positions is 21 years.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for retired teachers applying for Guest Teacher roles?
faq.answer: Retired teachers can apply for the Guest Teacher positions up to the age of 65 years, provided they are medically fit.

faq.question: Q4. What are the salary ranges for PGT and TGT Guest Teachers?
faq.answer: PGT Guest Teachers can expect a salary of Rs. 35,000/- with qualification and Rs. 31,000/- without qualification. TGT Guest Teachers will receive Rs. 33,000/- with qualification and Rs. 29,000/- without qualification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the primary mode of application for these Guest Teacher positions?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. What educational qualifications are required for the TGT posts?
faq.answer: For TGT posts, candidates need a Graduation with B.Ed. or an integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed. or CTET Paper-II qualification, along with specific subject requirements.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original certificates, one self-attested copy of each certificate, and one recent passport-size color photograph.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for these Guest Teacher positions?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for these Guest Teacher positions.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for Eklavya Model Residential School Khunti located?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Eklavya Model Residential School Khunti, Village: Rewa, Block: Khunti, Jharkhand, 835210.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Guest Teacher positions at EMRS Khunti?
faq.answer: The Guest Teacher positions are temporary appointments for the academic session 2026-27.
